title: Coinbase Wants to Be Canada's One-Stop Shop for Stocks, Crypto and Prediction Markets
message_html: Coinbase Wants to Be Canada's One-Stop Shop for Stocks, Crypto and Prediction Markets ...
snippet: The company's "Everything Exchange" is heading north. No launch date set yet, but the Coinbase Canada CEO says phase two for the company is in motion.

title: S&P launches blockchain fundamentals index for digital assets
message_html: S&P launches blockchain fundamentals index for digital assets ...
snippet: The benchmark tracks blockchain networks using protocol revenue, offering an alternative to traditional market capitalization-weighted crypto indexes.
